description: Perform a stability analysis on the Muncie HEC-RAS unsteady flow model using the simulation results in Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf. Compute the Courant number (C = V * Δt / Δx) for each cross-section at the time of peak flow. Save a CSV file to ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/courant_analysis.csv with columns: River_Station, Velocity_fps, Delta_X_ft, and Courant_Number. Create a summary report at ~/Documents/hec_ras_results/courant_report.txt including the Maximum Courant Number, the count of sections where C > 1.0, and a stability assessment (STABLE if Max < 1.0, MARGINAL if 1.0-2.0, or UNSTABLE if > 2.0).
